stocks.nameEn: The Chugoku Electric Power Co., Inc.

headlines.title: Forex daily: The Yen breaks 163 as Japan runs out of easy answers
Morning Bid: The new ad for chips? An AI model Breaking Bad
Tokyo vows to take ‘bold’ action as yen keeps sliding
Japan Signals Readiness to Act on Yen Weakness
Asian stocks extend gains as US rebounds, chipmakers lead
Japan’s exports and imports grow as yen weakens
Japan ready to take decisive action on forex if needed, finance minister says

marketTone.ko: 오늘 아시아 증시는 미국 시장 반등과 반도체주의 강세에 힘입어 상승세를 이어갔습니다. 그러나 엔화는 달러당 163엔을 돌파하며 지속적인 약세를 보여 일본 당국의 주요 관심사로 부상했습니다. 일본 재무장관을 비롯한 당국자들은 엔화 약세에 대해 필요시 '과감하고 단호한' 조치를 취할 준비가 되어 있다고 거듭 경고했습니다. 엔화 약세가 일본의 수출입 증가에 기여하고 있음에도 불구하고, 시장의 이목은 잠재적인 외환 시장 개입 가능성에 집중되고 있습니다.
marketTone.en: Asian stock markets extended gains today, driven by a rebound in US markets and strong performance from chipmakers. However, the Japanese yen's continued depreciation, breaking past 163 against the dollar, remained a central concern. Japanese officials, including the finance minister, repeatedly signaled readiness to take "bold" and "decisive action" on forex if needed, as the country reportedly runs out of easy answers to the sliding currency. Despite the yen's weakness boosting Japan's exports and imports, the focus remains on potential intervention.
